subject: Thank you for applying to Stripe
snippet: We have received your application for the Backend Engineer role and will review it shortly.

subject: Your application to Airbnb
snippet: Thanks for applying! Your application has been received.

subject: We received your application
snippet: Thank you for your interest in the Software Engineer, New Grad position.

subject: Application submitted successfully
snippet: You've successfully applied to Notion. We'll be in touch.

subject: Confirmation: your application for Data Analyst
snippet: This confirms we received your application for the Data Analyst opening.

subject: Your online assessment for Roblox
snippet: Please complete the coding challenge on HackerRank within 5 days.

subject: Let's chat about the PM role
snippet: I'd love to speak with you about your candidacy. Are you free for a call?

subject: Take-home exercise - Plaid

snippet: Congrats on passing the technical screen! Let's schedule your onsite interviews.

subject: Update on your application
snippet: After careful consideration, unfortunately we will not be moving forward with your candidacy.

subject: Regarding your candidacy at Robinhood
snippet: We regret to inform you that we've decided to move forward with other candidates.

subject: Your application status
snippet: We appreciate your interest, but we won't be proceeding at this time. We wish you the best.

subject: An update from Instacart
snippet: Thank you for interviewing with us. Unfortunately you have not been selected for this role.

subject: Following up on the Backend Engineer role
snippet: Just checking in on your interest in the position. Happy to answer any questions.

subject: A message about your candidacy
snippet: Tap to view the latest update on your application.

subject: Thanks for your interest in Asana
snippet: We received your resume and are reviewing candidates for the role.

subject: Congratulations from Airtable
snippet: We'd like to formally extend you an offer for the New Grad Software Engineer position.

subject: New jobs matching your search
